creator: t.m.guymer@thomasguymer.co.uk
text:
Has anyone had any luck working around this bug? I note that "graphics/gdal" was updated on 18/11/2019 to add build dependencies but unfortunately this hasn't solved the problem for me. I am still unable to build "graphics/gdal", which means that I cannot build "graphics/py-gdal", which means that I cannot build "graphics/py-cartopy" with the "PLOTTING" option enabled.

Any help would be greatly appreciated, thank you!
